data.description:

QMMM Holdings Limited ( (QMMM) ) has issued an update.

QMMM Holdings Limited, a company involved in financial services, announced significant changes in its board of directors. On June 30, 2025, Chun San Leung and Chan Anthony Saikit resigned from their positions as directors for personal reasons, with no disputes involved. They were replaced by Chong Ka Yee and Chun Kit Yu, who bring extensive experience in finance and accounting. These changes led to a re-designation of committee roles within the company, with Mr. Yu becoming the chairman of the audit committee.

HRnetGroup Ltd. ( (SG:CHZ) ) has issued an update.

HRnetGroup Ltd.’s subsidiary, RecruitFirst, has secured an extension of its contract with Singapore’s Ministry of Education for the FLAiR Programme, extending the partnership until December 2026. data.title: Bank of Ireland Adjusts Voting Rights After BlackRock’s HPS Acquisition
data.description:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

Bank Of Ireland Group plc ( (DE:BIRG) ) has issued an update.

Bank of Ireland Group PLC has announced a significant change in its voting rights structure due to a group restructure following the acquisition of HPS Investment Partners by BlackRock, Inc. This restructuring has resulted in a slight decrease in BlackRock’s total voting rights in the Bank of Ireland from 5.92% to 5.60%. This adjustment reflects BlackRock’s strategic realignment post-acquisition, potentially impacting its influence within the Bank of Ireland and signaling a shift in stakeholder dynamics.

More about Bank Of Ireland Group plc

data.title: EuroDry Ltd. Schedules 2025 Annual Shareholders Meeting
data.description:
Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half-Year Sale

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

EuroDry ( (EDRY) ) has issued an update.

On July 2, 2025, EuroDry Ltd. announced its upcoming Annual General Meeting of Shareholders, scheduled for July 23, 2025, in Washington, DC. Shareholders of record as of June 25, 2025, are eligible to attend and vote. This meeting is a significant event for the company as it provides an opportunity for shareholders to engage with the management and discuss the company’s future direction. The announcement underscores EuroDry’s commitment to transparency and shareholder engagement, which are crucial for maintaining investor confidence and supporting the company’s strategic goals in the competitive drybulk shipping industry.

The most recent analyst rating on (EDRY) stock is a Buy with a $30.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on EuroDry stock, see the EDRY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on EDRY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, EDRY is a Neutral.

EuroDry’s overall stock score is driven by significant financial challenges, including negative net income and strained cash flows. Technical analysis indicates bearish momentum, and the low valuation score highlights profitability issues. The combination of these factors results in a low overall stock score, reflecting the company’s current risk profile and the need for operational improvements.

To see Spark’s full report on EDRY stock, click here.

More about EuroDry

EuroDry Ltd., established in 2018, is a company that operates in the dry cargo, drybulk shipping market. It was spun-off from Euroseas Ltd and is listed on the NASDAQ Capital Market under the ticker EDRY. The company manages a fleet of 12 drybulk vessels, including Panamax, Ultramax, Kamsarmax, and Supramax carriers, with a total cargo capacity of 843,402 dwt. EuroDry’s operations are managed by Eurobulk Ltd. and Eurobulk (Far East) Ltd. Inc., which handle the commercial and technical management of the vessels.

data.title: So-Young Regains Nasdaq Compliance with Minimum Bid Price
data.description:
Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half-Year Sale

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

The latest update is out from So-Young International ( (SY) ).

So-Young International Inc. announced on July 3, 2025, that it has regained compliance with the Nasdaq’s minimum bid price requirement of $1.00 per share. This compliance follows a period of non-compliance that began on August 28, 2024, when the company’s American depositary shares fell below the required price for 30 consecutive business days. After receiving an extension from Nasdaq, the company successfully met the requirement by maintaining a closing bid price of at least $1.00 per share for 10 consecutive business days from June 17 to July 1, 2025. This development closes the compliance matter with Nasdaq, potentially stabilizing So-Young’s market position and reassuring stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (SY) stock is a Hold with a $0.80 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on So-Young International stock, see the SY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SY is a Neutral.

So-Young International’s overall stock score reflects significant financial difficulties, with declining revenue and profitability offset by a robust balance sheet and growth in its aesthetic treatment services. Technical indicators show short-term bullish momentum but caution of overvaluation risks. The negative valuation metrics further underscore the need for strategic improvements.

To see Spark’s full report on SY stock, click here.

More about So-Young International

So-Young International Inc. is a leading aesthetic treatment platform in China that connects consumers with both online services and offline treatments. The company offers access to aesthetic treatments through its online platform and branded aesthetic centers, providing curated treatment information, facilitating online reservations, delivering high-quality treatments, and developing, producing, and distributing optoelectronic medical equipment and injectable products.

Average Trading Volume: 715,121

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Tongda Group’s Strategic Investment in ICBC Wealth Management Product
data.description:
Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half-Year Sale

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

Tongda Group Holdings ( (HK:0698) ) has shared an update.

Tongda Group Holdings has announced that its subsidiary, Tongda Chuang Zhi, has subscribed to an ICBC Wealth Management Product using idle funds amounting to RMB156 million. This transaction is classified as a discloseable transaction under the Hong Kong Stock Exchange’s Listing Rules, as it exceeds 5% of the applicable percentage ratios. The subscription is a currency-linked structured deposit with a term of 29 days and an expected annualized return rate ranging from 0.65% to 1.99%. This move reflects the company’s strategic financial management efforts to optimize idle funds and enhance returns, potentially impacting its financial performance and stakeholder value.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0698) stock is a Buy with a HK$0.13 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tongda Group Holdings stock, see the HK:0698 Stock Forecast page.

More about Tongda Group Holdings

Tongda Chuang Zhi is an indirect non-wholly owned subsidiary of Tongda Group Holdings, based in the PRC. The company is primarily involved in the production of durable household goods, household utensils, sports goods, and healthcare goods.
